title: Personal Reader State, Idempotent Commands, Bulk Results, and Conflicts · Type-System Trace: Feed Ts Desired State Command

Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove private reader state, idempotent desired commands, bulk results, conflicts, and count repair; failed, canceled, stale, and cross-tenant work must preserve the prior admitted state; then change one tenant, cursor, reader command, authorization, validator, sanitizer, or accessibility condition without leaking state.
